posts.text:
Woke up in the middle of the night to Trump openly going full Farquaad.

  


Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump: The lives of American heroes may be lost, and we may have casualties — that often happens in war.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2027652088046796867#m

This art from The New Yorker really sparked a lot of debate and I wanted to know what you think about.

Is it right? Is it wrong? Is the current state of things more nuanced or complicated?

Be safe yall 😭


Jim Cramer (@jimcramer)

Taking the under, snow, Kalshi.



— https://nitter.net/jimcramer/status/2014785016631324676#m

Fun times 🎉🎉🎉



The New York Times (@nytimes)

Breaking News: The EPA will stop considering lives saved when setting pollution limits and instead calculate only the cost to businesses. nyti.ms/45RcBNE




— https://nitter.net/nytimes/status/2010783815615058327#m

Your Tuesday Philip DeFranco Show is Live!

open.spotify.com/episode/3wo…

Feel like I got tricked into watching Trump give himself a loud pep talk. 

Must be a bit shaken up from that new poll showing only 36% of Americans approve of his handling of the economy.

“i WaSnT eVEn wOrKinG oN iT vErY hArD”
🤣🤣🤣



The Associated Press (@AP)

BREAKING: Indiana Senate Republicans reject new congressional maps in defiance of President Trump’s redistricting push. apnews.com/article/indiana-l…




— https://nitter.net/AP/status/1999234952487936346#m
Had 2 very different chats today 😅

This may be the winner. I’ve seen a lot of 4500 to 5400 minutes being shared but this is the first 6k+

That’s over 100 hours of getting Phil’d in this year. 🔥🔥🔥


Rasmus Sandberg (@RasmusLDS)

@PhillyD I apparently can't get Phil's in enough 😅




— https://nitter.net/RasmusLDS/status/1996338453601034318#m

I turned 40 today and honestly it doesn’t suck. Years ago I thought it sounded like the worst thing but I’m feeling great and very blessed as I hit 4 decades of taking up space. 

Full life. Full heart. Thanks for being a part of it. Love yo faces. ❤️
I’ve been busy all day. wtf is happening? Is Trump in love with Mamdani? 😅🤣

Fiiinne. I’ll read the book AGAIN


Project Hail Mary (@projecthailmary)

An unlikely friendship. An impossible mission. Watch the new trailer for Project Hail Mary — starring Academy Award® nominee Ryan Gosling and directed by Academy Award®-winning filmmakers Phil Lord & Christopher Miller. Screenplay by Drew Goddard. Based on Andy Weir's New York Times best-selling novel. Only in theaters and IMAX 3.20.26.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/projecthailmary/status/1990791272592748977#m
